name: Single Straight Leg Stretch
shortDescription: A floor stretch focusing on the hamstrings by raising and holding one straight leg toward the body.
instructions: Lie on your back, legs extended. Lift one leg straight up, keeping it as straight as possible, and hold the calf or thigh to gently pull it closer, feeling a stretch in the hamstrings and calves. Then switch legs.
steps: Lie on your back with both legs straight.
Lift one leg up while keeping it straight.
Hold the back of your thigh or calf gently.
Pull the leg slightly toward your chest.
formCues: Point or flex foot for deeper stretch
breathing: Exhale as you stretch the leg, inhale as you lower it.
